channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Baba Levo reacts to ongoing pregnancy rumours surrounding singer Zuchu
item.description: Tanzania’s entertainment scene has been buzzing after rumours emerged claiming that popular Bongo Flava singer Zuchu might be pregnant. The speculation quickly spread across social media platforms and...

item.title: South Africa faces rising smoking rates and unregulated youth vaping
item.description: South Africa is experiencing troubling trends in both cigarette smoking and vaping among its youth. Cigarette smoking prevalence has risen from below 20% in 2010 to roughly 24% in 2021, reversing prev...

item.title: Economists warn AI-driven job losses could weaken consumer demand and destabilize the economy
item.description: A warning from economist and political scientist Chris Blattman has drawn attention to a recent academic study examining the economic risks posed by rapid artificial intelligence adoption. The study, ...

item.title: Study warns illegal plant trade in Quebec is increasing and threatening ecosystems
item.description: A recent study has raised concerns about the rapid growth of the illegal plant trade in Quebec, highlighting its environmental and economic impacts. Researchers found that demand for rare, exotic, and...

item.title: Makati Pride Night Ends Early Due to Safety Issue
item.description: The Pride Night event in Makati had to be concluded earlier than planned because of an unexpected safety incident. Organizers reported that a generator caught fire during the program, prompting an imm...

item.title: KC Green Settles Dispute with AI Startup Artisan Over 'This is Fine' Artwork
item.description: KC Green, the artist behind the iconic 'This is fine' meme, has resolved a dispute with AI startup Artisan over the use of his artwork. The conflict began when Artisan used a modified version of Green...

item.title: Kvaratskhelia wins Champions League Player of the Season as PSG dominate team of the season
item.description: Khvicha Kvaratskhelia has been crowned UEFA Champions League Player of the Season after playing a pivotal role in Paris St Germain’s successful defence of their European title. The Georgian winger, ag...

item.title: YouTube creators achieve major box office success with two leading weekend films
item.description: This TechCrunch article reports on an emerging trend in the film industry: successful feature films directed by creators who originally built their audiences on YouTube. Over a single weekend, the top...

item.title: Robert Reich on inequality, corporate power, and the economic conditions behind Trump-style politics
item.description: In this opinion piece, Robert Reich argues that American politics cannot be understood separately from the structure of the U.S. economy. He points to recent economic data showing a widening gap betwe...

item.title: Nigeria Police Mobilise Retired Officers to Support Training of 50,000 New Recruits
item.description: Nigeria Police Force don begin serious preparation to train about 50,000 new constables across the country, and as part of the plan, dem don direct all police training institutions to identify retired...

item.title: Myanmar President Min Aung Hlaing holds talks with NSA Ajit Doval during first visit to India
item.description: National Security Adviser Ajit Doval met Myanmar President Min Aung Hlaing in New Delhi on Sunday, marking the Myanmar leader's first visit to India since assuming office in April. This visit comes ju...

item.title: Wetang’ula calls for strict enforcement of safety rules in schools after fatal fire incident
item.description: National Assembly Speaker Moses Wetang’ula has called on the Ministry of Education and relevant authorities to take firm action against schools that are failing to comply with established safety regul...

item.title: Yathindra Siddaramaiah hopeful for ministerial role in Karnataka under DK Shivakumar
item.description: Yathindra Siddaramaiah, Congress MLC and son of outgoing Karnataka Chief Minister Siddaramaiah, has expressed hope for a ministerial position in the forthcoming state government led by Chief Minister-...

item.title: Australian researchers train brain cells to play Doom
item.description: Australian researchers have trained lab-grown human brain cells on a silicon chip to interact with the classic video game Doom, a milestone that highlights the growing field of biological computing. T...

item.title: Wyre introduces his wife and shares family moments at Eko Dydda’s wedding
item.description: Veteran Kenyan musician Wyre made a notable appearance during gospel artist Eko Dydda’s white wedding ceremony, where he briefly introduced his wife to fellow guests. Known for keeping his family life...

item.title: Federal Government Approves 1,000 Forest Guards and Special Rescue Operation After Oyo School Abduction
item.description: President Bola Tinubu has approved urgent security measures following the abduction of pupils and teachers in Oyo State. The decision includes the recruitment of 1,000 forest guards to help secure for...

item.title: How a guitar maker’s supply chain investigation revealed connections to elephant-related environmental impacts
item.description: In this opinion piece, Bob Taylor, co-founder of Taylor Guitars, reflects on his decades-long journey in building a global musical instrument company and the unexpected environmental implications hidd...

item.title: Community in George rallies in support after death of 12-year-old Morgan Mentoor
item.description: The community in George, South Africa, has been deeply shaken following the death of 12-year-old Morgan Mentoor on 23 May 2026. Morgan, a well-known young karate champion and school learner, has been ...

item.title: Sen. Bong Go distributes assistance to indigent residents in Quezon City
item.description: Senator Bong Go extended assistance to indigent residents in Batasan Hills, Quezon City during a community outreach activity held on May 25. Working alongside Quezon City District 2 Councilor Mikey Be...

item.title: Roger Stone urges Trump to dismiss Smithsonian staff over disputed Nixon impeachment claim
item.description: A close political ally of Donald Trump, Roger Stone, has publicly called for the president to remove all staff members of the Smithsonian Institution following a controversy involving how the museum s...
